domain: Digital attendance and session check-in for educational workshops and classes
description: Web and mobile-web check-in system that replaces manual roll call with rotating QR codes, GPS verification, and attendance reporting for cohorts of 100–150 participants per session.
organizationContext: Harness Engineering for Software Development (HESD) workshop program and institutional training office operations
primaryCapabilities: Mobile web QR scan with GPS location verification
Attendance reporting by class and subject
